overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval rural landscape. The character travels from a dirt path into a village with cobblestone streets, passes through an overgrown cemetery with stone monuments, and emerges into open countryside with a distant castle visible on the horizon.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a dirt path bordered by stone walls, approaching a village with wooden cottages

entered.detail: low stone wall running along the left side of the path
unpaved dirt trail with patches of grass
traditional wooden house with dark timber framing
tall leafy tree providing shade over the path ahead

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a rural dirt path flanked by stone walls, approaching a village. A wooden cottage becomes visible on the right while a large tree dominates the view ahead, with sunlight filtering through the leaves.

events.description: ground surface transitions from dirt to cobblestone upon entering the village proper

agents.ego_description: walking through the village interior, passing close by wooden structures and a parked cart

entered.detail: irregular stone paving covering the village street
large wooden wagon with iron-rimmed wheels parked beside the cottage
steeply pitched roof with straw thatching on a small outbuilding

segments.scene_description: The path becomes cobblestone as Geralt enters the village proper, passing a wooden cart parked beside a timber-framed cottage. The stone wall recedes to the left while the buildings create a more enclosed corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown cemetery with ancient stone monuments

events.description: exits the village street and enters a cemetery area with scattered stone gravestones
approaches figures in red and white clothing standing among the gravestones

agents.ego_description: walking carefully through the cemetery toward figures standing near the graves, weapons sheathed on back

notable_agents.action: figures in red and white clothing standing among the gravestones, possibly guards or soldiers

entered.detail: weathered stone tomb markers with carved symbols scattered throughout the grass
larger ornate stone memorials with skull carvings
massive ancient oak with spreading branches shading the cemetery
stone archway marking the exit from the cemetery

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a shaded cemetery filled with ancient stone grave markers and overgrown grass. He approaches several figures in red clothing standing among the tombs beneath a massive oak tree, with a stone gate visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside path leading to fortified castle

events.description: passes through the stone gate leaving the cemetery, entering open countryside
large stone castle with towers becomes clearly visible on the horizon

agents.ego_description: walking along an open dirt path toward a distant castle, leaving the cemetery behind

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through open fields with wooden fence posts
simple wooden post fence running alongside the path
large fortified stone structure with multiple towers and smoking chimneys

segments.scene_description: Passing through the stone gate, Geralt emerges into open countryside with a dirt path leading toward a large fortified castle visible on the horizon. The landscape opens up with wooden fences lining the path and the castle's towers dominating the distant view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rural dirt path through a secluded village and cemetery, eventually opening into a vast landscape dominated by a distant fortress. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path flanked by stone walls, moving toward a wooden cottage as sunlight filters through the leaves of a large tree ahead. As the terrain shifts to cobblestone, the camera enters the village proper, passing a parked wooden cart and timber-framed houses that create an enclosed corridor. The scene then transitions into the cool shade of an overgrown cemetery filled with ancient stone markers and figures in red clothing gathered beneath a massive oak. Finally, the camera passes through a stone gate to emerge into the open countryside, where the view expands across wooden fences toward the towering spires of a fortified castle on the horizon.
